## English

This release contains the tagged versions of `patent-bilingual-qa` and `patent-office-action-response`. The attached archives are built deterministically after the repository tests and skill-discovery checks pass. Verify downloads with `SHA256SUMS.txt`.

This is a drafting and review aid, not legal advice or filing authorization. See `DISCLAIMER.md` before use.

## 简体中文

本版本包含标签对应的 `patent-bilingual-qa` 和 `patent-office-action-response`。仓库测试及 Skill 发现检查通过后，工作流会生成可复现压缩包。请使用 `SHA256SUMS.txt` 校验下载文件。

本项目只用于起草和审阅辅助，不构成法律意见或提交授权。使用前请阅读 `DISCLAIMER.md`。
